a:r.a:t: Sales employee sentiment on compensation-related topics is notably more negative than Marketing and Telemarketing
Summary of Marketing and Telemarketing Sentiment vs Sales Sentiment
The Sales function broadly aligns with Marketing and Telemarketing
in categories where overall employee sentiment is strong such as role clarity and pride in the organization
Sales sentiment lags compared to Marketing and Telemarketing in topics associated with compensation
Perceptions of uncompetitive earnings potential and unfair quotas/targets may increase the risk of talent loss to competitors
